**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Kajie Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. is a 'Zhujiang Road single-person universal digital grocery shop' that was extremely hastily categorized into 'Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing' by the official system. The forensic engine has completely cleared the underlying transnational consumer electronics OEM data pollution caused by Apple Inc. The official commercial registry system simply because its name contains 'Electronic Technology' and the beginning of its license features a highly perfunctory 'R&D of specialized electronic materials,' directly stamped it with the heavy-asset seal of manufacturing. However, the physical probe directly shattered this disguise: this is a natural person sole proprietorship micro-enterprise with a paid-in capital of only 1 million, and its 2024 insured headcount is only '1 person'! The most fatal demotion strike comes from its registered coordinates: 'Room 912, No. 435 Zhujiang Road, Xuanwu District, Nanjing City.' Zhujiang Road is an extremely famous 'computer and digital street' in Nanjing. In an electronics market building on the 9th floor (Room 912), relying on 1 employee to 'manufacture electronic equipment' and 'R&D specialized electronic materials'? This is absolutely impossible in both physical space and manpower models. Reviewing its extremely lengthy business license again, it reads exactly like an inventory list for an electronics mall shop: 'retail of computer software and hardware, mobile phone sales, watch sales, audio equipment sales, retail of daily home appliances, and even sales of drones and wearable devices.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not an electronic manufacturing plant; it is a pure 'One-Person Electronics & Gadget Retailer and repair shop inside the Zhujiang Road computer city.' The boss (Xu Hui) probably rented a small storefront or desk in Room 912, relying on the supply channels of Zhujiang Road, selling whatever is trendy (from drones to office consumables), and incidentally taking on some computer and phone repair jobs to earn the price difference.
